steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is the book title A Sheaf Gleaned in French Fields. The phrase set off by commas describes that one volume, so the subject is singular.

steps.title: Use a singular verb
steps.content: B, C, and D all use plural verb forms that do not agree with the singular book title. The matching choice uses a singular present-perfect verb. The answer is A.
